summary: Generated exactly one runnable helper script artifact that wraps the reviewed PDF-to-Excel delegate with conservative evidence gating, sidecar report handoff via --report-json, portable delegate resolution, timeout handling, partial-on-dry-run/zero-input semantics, and explicit readonly/reviewable runtime summaries.
notes: The script is parameter-driven and does not hardcode the requested input directory.
It prefers the reviewed repository delegate artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py and fails honestly if that delegate is unavailable.
Wrapper success is intentionally conservative and requires structured delegate evidence beyond exit code and file existence.
Dry-run and zero-PDF discovery resolve to partial, not success.
Readonly wording is limited to no external/Trello writeback; local filesystem output may still occur when dry_run=false.
